strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance systems
Active AI/agentic infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source builder track record with GISCollective, public speaking, and community workshops
concerns: Current and historical titles (Senior/Staff Engineer) are well below the Director-level IC seniority the role explicitly targets
AI engagement is limited to one year and is tooling-adjacent rather than product-defining or strategically led — no demonstrated large-scale AI platform shipped
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; holds a BS in CS and a BFA, missing the preferred Master's/PhD qualification
response.justification: Bogdan is a broadly skilled engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and a promising recent pivot toward agentic tooling, but the role calls for a Director-level IC with deep, recognized AI expertise and a history of shaping cloud or AI strategy at scale. His AI work spans a single year and sits at the infrastructure-tooling layer rather than product or platform leadership. The seniority and AI-depth gaps are both significant and disqualifying for this level; he would be a stronger fit for a senior IC role on an AI platform team where he could grow into this profile.
